# The Bonaparte Family Portal
Stack: React 19 + TS + Vite 7 + Tailwind 4 + Radix + wouter + Vercel
Cores: CSS variables oklch() em index.css — nunca hex direto
Fontes: Merriweather (editorial) + Inter (interface)
Dark mode: ThemeContext, classe .dark no html
Dados: client/src/data/ com tipos — nunca mock
